overall.description: First-person driving sequence through a rainy industrial district at night in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The player navigates a vehicle through fenced service roads, beneath concrete overpasses, and into a container yard with abandoned vehicles, featuring atmospheric fog and cyberpunk neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial service road with concrete retaining walls

agents.ego_description: driving slowly along a fenced industrial road in heavy rain, navigating wet pavement

entered.detail: tall concrete wall with weathered surface running parallel to the road
metal chain link fence with red posts separating the road from industrial area
large industrial building with corrugated metal exterior and few windows
tall street lamp casting yellow-orange light through the rain

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives along a narrow industrial service road at night during heavy rain. A concrete retaining wall runs along the left side while chain-link fencing borders the right, with a large warehouse structure visible in the distance through the hazy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: area beneath concrete overpass with industrial debris

events.description: vehicle passes under a massive concrete overpass entering a more open yard area
lighting shifts to darker shadows and amber tones under the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: navigating under the concrete overpass and entering the industrial yard area

entered.detail: massive concrete bridge overhead with visible support beams and dark underside
large yellow industrial dumpster with debris scattered around it
pile of white debris and trash bags near the fence line

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes beneath a massive concrete overpass, transitioning from the enclosed road to a more open industrial yard. The lighting shifts to darker amber tones under the bridge, with yellow dumpsters and debris piles visible along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial yard with shipping containers and abandoned vehicles

events.description: driving through metal gate into large open container yard
vehicle slows down to navigate around shipping containers and debris

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through the container yard past abandoned cars and shipping containers

notable_agents.action: abandoned white sedan with rust and damage parked near containers

entered.detail: large metal industrial gate marking entrance to the container yard
large orange metal shipping container with corrugated sides
open-air wooden shelter structure with roof and support posts

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a wide-open container yard through a metal gate, navigating around orange shipping containers and abandoned vehicles. The area is exposed to the heavy rain with scattered debris and a wooden shelter visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: container yard near building with red and green neon lighting

events.description: vehicle makes a sharp right turn around shipping containers
red and green neon lights become visible on the nearby industrial building

agents.ego_description: turning the vehicle around obstacles and approaching the building with colored lighting

notable_agents.action: abandoned green car with open doors and visible damage

entered.detail: industrial building facade illuminated by red and green neon lights
damaged green vehicle with open doors sitting in the yard

segments.scene_description: The vehicle navigates through the container yard, making a sharp turn around obstacles. An industrial building with distinctive red and green neon lighting becomes visible in the distance, while abandoned cars litter the wet asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: container yard with view of vehicle interior during turn

events.description: camera briefly shows interior of vehicle cabin and dashboard while turning
vehicle completes U-turn and accelerates back toward the gate

agents.ego_description: completing a U-turn in the yard and driving back toward the exit

entered.detail: large cylindrical concrete pillar supporting the overhead structure

segments.scene_description: The vehicle performs a U-turn in the container yard, briefly showing the interior dashboard before facing back toward the entrance. The camera captures concrete support pillars and the industrial warehouse now on the left side as the vehicle accelerates toward the exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rainy industrial district that transitions from a narrow service road into a wide-open container yard. It begins by navigating a tight corridor flanked by a concrete retaining wall and chain-link fencing, with a distant warehouse looming through the heavy rain and haze. As the vehicle moves forward, the scene shifts beneath a massive concrete overpass where the lighting turns to dark amber tones and the path is lined with yellow dumpsters and debris. The camera then emerges from the bridge's shadow and passes through a metal gate, opening into an expansive yard filled with orange shipping containers and abandoned vehicles. The sequence finally settles into this exposed industrial space, moving past scattered wreckage toward a distant wooden shelter under the relentless downpour.

The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective through a rainy container yard that shifts from navigating deep within the industrial complex to accelerating toward its exit. It begins with the vehicle weaving through abandoned cars on wet asphalt, making a sharp turn as a distant industrial building glows with red and green neon lighting. As the vehicle performs a U-turn, the camera briefly captures the interior dashboard before pivoting to face the yard's entrance. The scene then shifts as the vehicle accelerates forward, passing concrete support pillars with the neon-lit warehouse now receding to the left.
